memoryArtifacts.headline: Ravensworth Castle - Home of the FitzHugh families
memoryArtifacts.description: The remaining piece of the ancient castle which belonged to the FitzHugh family.  Being that it is close to the Scottish borders the land was involved in skirmishes from time to time.cwi

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh FitzHenry於大約1258年出生時，他的父親Henry FitzRandolf42歲，母親Alice de Thoresby48歲。他和Albreda Steyngrave至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1304年3月12日在英國越可爾享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾洛馬爾德吉可。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHenry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Henry (see Henry ), ‘son of Henry’. This surname is common in Ireland (mainly Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Éinrí. In at least some cases, it seems to have been adopted as a surname indicating the illegitimate offspring of a man called Henry.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh FitzHenry was born about 1258, his father, Henry FitzRandolf, was 42 and his mother, Alice de Thoresby, was 48. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Albreda Steyngrave. He died on 12 March 1304, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Romaldkirk, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh FitzHenry est né environ 1258, son père, Henry FitzRandolf, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice de Thoresby, avait 48 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Albreda Steyngrave. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1304, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Romaldkirk, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzHenryが約1258年に生まれた時，父Henry FitzRandolfは42歳，母Alice de Thoresbyは48歳であった。彼はAlbreda Steyngraveとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1304年3月12日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアロマルドキルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzHenry(이)가 대략 1258년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry FitzRandolf(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Thoresby(은)는 48세였다. 그는 Albreda Steyngrave(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1304년 3월 12일 영국 요르크실르에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 로마드커크에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Albreda Steyngrave. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1304, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Romaldkirk, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh FitzHenry родился около 1258 г., его отцу по имени Henry FitzRandolf было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Thoresby, 48. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Albreda Steyngrave. Он умер 12 марта 1304 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности ромалдкирк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
